summary: 3 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Love Hypothesis
film.talent: Lili Reinhart as Olive Smith, Tom Bateman as Adam Carlsen
film.announcement: Prime Video released first teaser trailer for the romantic comedy adaptation based on the bestselling fan fiction novel.

film.title: Romy & Michele Sequel
film.announcement: Production has officially begun on the sequel to the 1997 comedy, with Mira Sorvino marking the first day of filming.

film.title: Get Jiro
film.announcement: Warner Bros. Animation sneak peeked the upcoming animated project at Annecy Adult Animation Showcase.

tv.title: Overcompensating
tv.announcement: Season 2 will feature a Spring Break episode inspired by Fyre Festival with a cameo appearance by musician Zedd.

tv.title: Dark Shadows
tv.announcement: Warner Bros. Animation announced a new animated series based on Dark Shadows at Annecy Adult Animation Showcase.
